title: ANC - 5.-ANC is ON and User changes its value from Adaptive to Standard or vice versa during call when Transparency is OFF without selected values
scenario: ANC mode switching between Adaptive and Standard during a call does not persist correctly or leaves Transparency Mode accessible
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → ANC.
3. Set ANC to ON and select Adaptive mode.
4. Ensure Transparency Mode is OFF (no value selected, greyed out).
5. Initiate or receive a phone call via the paired Poly device.
6. During the active call, go to Audio Settings → ANC.
7. Switch the ANC mode from Adaptive to Standard.
8. Verify that ANC remains ON and Transparency Mode remains greyed out/inaccessible.
9. Switch the ANC mode back from Standard to Adaptive.
10. Verify that ANC remains ON and Transparency Mode remains greyed out/inaccessible.
12. After the call ends, navigate to Audio Settings → ANC.
13. Verify that ANC is still ON and set to the last selected value (e.g., Adaptive).
14. Verify that Transparency Mode remains OFF and greyed out.
expected: ANC stays ON during the call when switching between Adaptive and Standard modes. Transparency Mode remains greyed out/inaccessible during the call. After the call ends, ANC remains ON with the last selected value (Adaptive or Standard), and Transparency Mode stays OFF.
